allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://roosterkitchen.co.uk/" -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "http response:"; $r.StatusCode; $r.Headers.Location; "---"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://roosterkitchen.co.uk/" -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "https response:"; $r2.StatusCode)
